caption: A video call interface displays a screen-share of a complex conceptual map on a black background, featuring various circular icons connected by blue lines. Several of these icons contain text, such as "Insights", "Interdisciplinary", "Holistic", and "Integrative Thinking". A small video feed in the top right corner shows a man wearing a dark shirt and a dark baseball cap, looking toward the camera. Browser tabs are visible at the top of the screen, with titles including "Trust & Learning by Systemeni", "Future of Society by Systemeni", and "Road Community Food Space". A side panel on the right lists the participant as "Grant Bedding". Throughout the sequence of frames, the scene remains static; the conceptual map, the browser layout, and the man's position and expression in the video feed do not change.
